response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified two distinct vocal music scenes in the video. 2. Song 1 detected from bottom-left text as 'チェイス!チェイス!チェイス!'. Search confirmed it's by Parquets. 3. Song 2 detected from bottom-left text as '防人恋歌' (Sakimori Renka). Lyrics transcribed from video subtitles as no direct search result found. 4. Created JSON output with all required fields and full lyrics.
response.global_summary: The video captures part of the Shiranui Flare Birthday Celebration 2025, featuring a performance of "Chase! Chase! Chase!" by Shiranui Flare and a guest, followed by a solo performance of "Sakimori Renka" by Shiranui Flare.

scenes.description: Shiranui Flare and a guest perform 'Chase! Chase! Chase!' with choreography. Song title and artist appear on screen.
